The armor does not give any bonuses to the base Armor Class, but it does grant a +25% resistance to all physical damage and an additional +5 bonus to Jan's Armor Class against missile weapons. Jan may also cast spells while wearing this armor. In addition, the armor is stylish.

Note: Dry clean only

STATISTICS:

Equipped abilities: 
– Physical Damage Resistance: +25%

Armor Class: 9 (4 vs. missile)
Requires:
 4 Strength
 17 Dexterity

Weight: 3《姚森牌金屬冒險裝（申請專利中）

這套奇怪的裝甲是用異域的金屬製成的，非常輕，但是摸起來很堅固。它是為姚恩·姚森設計，只有他可以穿戴。護甲本身並未提高基礎防禦等級，但是它對所有物理傷害皆提供+25%的抗力，並使姚恩對遠程武器的防禦等級獲得+5加權。除此之外，這件冒險裝看起來非常時髦。

@51954  = ~Jansen-Brand Micro-Macro Spectroscopes—(Official Spectroscopes of the Purple Brotherhood)
Another one of Jan Jansen's inventions, these glasses allow Jan to detect invisibility once per day. They also give Jan an additional 25% to his detect and disarm traps abilities. Various lenses on the contraption increase Jan's ability to detect illusions by 20%. The style of the Spectroscopes is so obvious it hardly needs to be mentioned.

@54805  = ~Shadow
Shadows are malevolent, undead creatures that drain strength from their victims with their chilling touch. Those so afflicted can look forward to becoming a shadow themselves if contact continues. 《陰影是邪惡的不死生物，以寒冷的碰摸吸取獵物的力量。如果持續接觸的話，受苦者有可能變成陰影。》~
@54806  = ~Kuo-toa《寇濤》~
@54807  = ~Kuo-toa
Kuo-toa are an ancient race of fish-men that dwell underground and harbor a deep hatred for surface-dwellers and sunlight. Insanity is common among the species.《寇濤是一支古老的魚人種族，住在地下，對於地面的居民和日光極為厭惡。這個種族常見瘋狂之人。》~
@54808  = ~Mephit《魔蝠》~
@54809  = ~Mephit
Mephits are nasty little messengers created by powerful lower planes creatures, and are evil and malicious by nature. Six types of mephits are known: fire, ice, lava, mist, smoke, and steam.《魔蝠是卑鄙的小使者，由強大的下界怪物所造，其天性邪惡。已知有六種魔蝠：火、冰、岩漿、霧、煙霧，及蒸氣魔蝠。》~
@54810  = ~Imp《小惡魔》~
@54811  = ~Imp
Imps are diminutive creatures of an evil nature that roam the world and occasionally act as familiars for evil wizards and priests. Only magical or silver weapons harm them, and they also regenerate. 《小惡魔是極小的生物，天性邪惡，四處遊走，有時作為邪惡法師和祭司的寵物。只有魔法武器或銀製武器能夠傷害它們，而且它們也會再生。》~
@54812  = ~Golem《巨像》~
@54813  = ~Golem
"Golem" is a broad term that covers many types of magical constructs. Most are humanoid, though they can be of inhuman size, and most require magical means to destroy them.《「巨像」是一種廣泛的名詞，指多種魔法結構物。大部分為類人型，不過它們也可能是非人類的樣式，而且大部分需要用魔法的方式才能摧毀它們。》~
@54814  = ~Elemental《元素》~
@54815  = ~Elemental
Elementals are sentient beings that can possess bodies made of one of the four basic elements that make up the Prime Material Plane: air, earth, fire, and water.《元素是有知覺的生物，可能擁有以四種構成原始界的基本元素所構成的身體：風、土、火及水。》~
@54816  = ~Dragon《龍》~
@54817  = ~Dragon
Dragons are an ancient, winged reptilian race. They are known and feared for their size, physical prowess, and magical abilities. The oldest dragons are among the most powerful creatures in the world. Chromatic dragons are generally evil in nature, while metallic dragons tend towards good. 《龍是古老有翼的爬蟲種族。它們的體積、身體的力量及魔法能力令人畏懼。最古老的龍是世界最強大的生物之一。各種色彩的龍通常具有邪惡的本質，而金屬色的龍則傾向為善。》~
@54818  = ~Genie《巨靈》~
@54819  = ~Genie
Genies come from the elemental planes, but are sometimes encountered on the Prime Material Plane and are occasionally summoned to perform a service for a powerful wizard or priest. The reaction of the genie towards such an indignity can vary from type to type.《巨靈來自元素界，但是有時候可以在主物質界見到，有時也會被召喚前來為強大的巫師或祭司執行工作。巨靈對這種做法的反應因種類而異。》~
@54820  = ~Lich《巫妖》~
@54821  = ~Lich
The lich is potentially the most powerful form of undead known to exist, and they are difficult, if not impossible, to destroy. Besides having the power of an undead wizard at their command, they store their life force in a secure location separate from their physical form. Destruction of their body is meaningless unless the container is found as well. 《巫妖可能是現知的不死怪物中最強大的態，而且很難消滅它們。除了擁有不死巫師的力量可供使用之外，它們可以在一個與其物理形態分離的安全地方儲存其生命能量。除非找到這個儲存點，否則消滅其身體是沒有意義的。》~

@54892  = ~WILD MAGE: Wild magic is a new type of magic that is characterized by powerful and dangerous surges of unpredictable magic. Generally considered to be an unfortunate byproduct of the Time of Troubles, wild magic has recently begun to attract the attention of many a curious or scholarly wizard.

Wild Mages are wizards who specialize in the study of wild magic. They have access to spells to protect themselves from wild magic and bend it to their wills. Wild magic is extremely unpredictable and should be used with caution.

CLASS FEATURES:

– May memorize one additional spell per level.
– May cast the 1st-level spell Nahal's Reckless Dweomer.
– May cast the 2nd-level spell Chaos Shield (included in spellbook for free).
– May cast the 7th-level spell Improved Chaos Shield (included in spellbook for free).
– Upon casting a spell, there is a 5% chance of incurring a wild surge.

WILD SURGE: A wild surge generates a completely random magical effect from the spell being cast. Its effects may be either beneficial or detrimental to the Wild Mage and <PRO_HISHER> allies.

– Casting level varies slightly whenever <PRO_HESHE> casts a spell—anywhere between five levels lower and five levels higher than the Wild Mage's true level.《狂亂法師：狂亂魔法是一種新形態的法術，以強大、危險、與不可預測的澎湃法力波濤為其特徵。一般來說，咸認為這是一項很糟的「大動亂時代」副產物；不過近來卻吸引了許多好奇、或是學院派巫師們的注意。

所謂的狂亂法師，即是指那些專攻狂亂魔法研究的法師。由於每一次施展法術時均會有5%的機率亂數產生不可預測的魔法效果，因此狂亂法師們也必須精研保護他們自身不受狂亂魔法反噬的法術。狂亂魔法是極難預測的，在使用時一定要相當謹慎。》~

@55372  = ~Spell Trigger is much like Spell Sequencer in that it allows the caster to store several spells in a trigger item that can be released upon any target, including the caster. The spells stored in the sequencer are cast as any other spell and can be accessed through the Special Abilities button on the main screen. It is important to note that when you choose the spells to be stored in the trigger, they will disappear from the ones you have memorized. However, the trigger will last until used, so the caster may rest and gain those spells back. The main use for this spell would be to allow the caster to release multiple spells upon a target very quickly in combat without the possibility of being interrupted.《法術啟動非常類似法術定序術，都允許施法者儲藏數個法術的力量在一個啟動物品中，然後再將魔力釋放到任何的目標上，包括施法者本人。儲存在定序能力當中的法術可以透過主遊戲畫面底下的特術能力按鍵，就像其他法術一樣施展出來。要特別注意的是，當你選定要儲存在法術啟動中的法術時，這些法術也會隨之從法師的記憶中消失，就像已經被施展出去一樣。然而法術啟動卻會一直持續保留到被用掉為止，所以法師可以進行休息將法術重新記憶起來。此法術的主要功能是允許法師可以在戰鬥中，快速地同時釋放出數個法術在同一個目標上，而不會有被中斷的危機。》~
@55373  = ~Contingency spells allow the caster to store a spell(s) inside <PRO_HISHER> body. The spell in question will then be released upon the caster when the condition specified at casting occurs. For example, a wizard could place Stoneskins in a contingency, which could then be set to go off when the caster reaches 50% of <PRO_HISHER> Hit Points. Then, when the caster reaches 50% of <PRO_HISHER> Hit Points, the spell will be released and cast upon the wizard. The uses for this spell are limited only by the imagination of the caster.《意外術允許施法者將數個法術存藏在自己的體內。當特定的條件成立時，這些選定儲藏的法術便會自動釋放施展出來。舉例而言，一名法師可以將石膚術設定在意外術當中，並且設定在生命點數只剩下50%的時候自動啟動。如此一來，當法師的生命點數降至50%或更低的時候，石膚術便會自動施展在法師的身上。此法術的應用範圍只會受到施法者本身想像力的條件限制。》~

@55714  = ~CHAPTER FOUR

Bodhi was as good as her word, and you are quickly under sail, the flamboyant Saemon Havarian at the helm. The journey is uneventful, and if there were other ships on the same course, they must have kept a discreet distance. You make good time, and soon there is a sizable island on the horizon. It might have been considered a pleasant place, but a grim shadow extends the length of it. The asylum, Spellhold, looms from a cliffside.《第四章

@55843  = ~Negative Plane Protection
(Abjuration)

Level: 4
Sphere: Protection, Necromantic
Range: Touch
Duration: 5 rounds
Casting Time: 3
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None

This spell affords the caster or the touched creature partial protection from undead monsters with Negative Energy Plane connections (such as vampires), and certain weapons and spells that drain energy levels. The Negative Plane Protection spell opens a channel to the Positive Energy Plane, possibly offsetting the effects of the negative energy attack. A protected creature struck by a negative energy attack is protected against any form of level draining for the duration of the spell. The protected creature suffers only normal Hit Point damage from the attack and does not suffer any drain of experience. This spell cannot be cast on the Negative Energy Plane.《防護負界傷害（防護系）
領域：保護系、死靈系
有效距離：碰觸
持續時間：5輪
施法時間：3
影響範圍：一個生物
豁免檢定：無

此法術可以防禦某些與負界能量連結之不死生物（如吸血鬼），以及某些會吸取能量等級的法術或武器。此法術可以打通正能量界的通道，抵消負界能量攻擊的效果。在此法術的作用期間之內，受術者可以抵擋由負界能量所造成的攻擊，不被吸取經驗等級，而只受到一般的攻擊傷害。此法術在負能量界將無法施展。》~

(Necromancy)

Level: 4
Sphere: Necromantic
Range: Touch
Duration: Permanent
Casting Time: 2
Area of Effect: 1 creature
Saving Throw: None 

When this spell is cast, the life energy level of the recipient is raised. This reverses any previous life energy level drain of the creature by a force or monster. The casting of this spell is very draining on the priest and <PRO_HESHE> will likely require rest immediately after the casting, as it will cause days' worth of fatigue almost instantaneously.《次級復原術（死靈系）
等級：4
領域：死靈系
有效距離：碰觸
持續時間：永久

豁免檢定：無

@57352  = ~The Unholy Reaver: Ir'revrykal
This dark, two-handed sword radiates evil from a distance. The weapon is not just unholy, but unearthly as well. Long thought to be just a myth, the blade's infamy pervades the accounts of learned bards and ancient sages. According to these accounts, the githyanki wizard-smith Ir'mlar forged the blade many centuries ago in dark caverns deep beneath Tu'narath. This githyanki city floats in the Astral Plane upon the petrified corpse of a dead god known only as "the One in the Void." To craft the sword, Ir'mlar allegedly used the One's own bones, which consist of a metallic substance unknown on the Prime Material Plane. The smith then imbued the weapon with a fiendish entity whom some seers claim was a mighty prince of the lower plane of Carceri. Others claim the sword contains the One in the Void's own spirit, banished within the blade for crimes committed against other gods in past ages. In any case, Ir'revrykal possesses such an enmity against good that only blackguards committed to evil may wield it. Circular runes etched on the blade proclaim its name in ancient tir'su, the githyanki language. The runes translate roughly as "Pain-Servant."

– Immunity to charm

– 50% chance to Dispel Magic on each hit

Weight: 10《不潔掠奪者：「伊爾』雷弗裡卡」

從很遠的地方就能感受到這把黑色的雙手劍散發出的邪惡的氣息。這把武器不僅邪惡，同時也非常神秘。長久以來，人們認為這只是一個傳說，其惡名在博學的吟遊詩人和古代聖賢的記述中隨處可見。根據這些敘述，吉斯揚基法師（同時也是一位鐵匠）伊爾『姆拉爾在幾個世紀之前，在圖納拉斯（譯註：吉斯洋基首都）之下的黑暗洞穴中鍛造了這把武器。

這座吉斯洋基城市漂浮在星界位面中，一個已死、被稱為「虛空之神」的神的石化屍體上空。據說伊爾』姆拉爾Ir'mlar為了鍛造這把劍甚至使用了那個死去的神的骨頭。骨頭中包含了一種在主物質位面根本無人知曉的金屬物質。

後來，鐵匠將武器灌入一個惡魔體內。一些賢者認為那是位於卡瑟利（譯註：流放地獄）下層位面的一個強大的惡魔王子；而另一些人則認為，這把劍包含了虛空之神的靈魂，因為在過去的年代裡對其他神靈犯下的罪行而被放逐到此劍之中。無論如何，伊爾』雷弗裡卡對於善良的人們都是一種邪惡的存在，只有邪惡的黑衛才能使用它。

銘刻在劍刃上的圓形符文刻下了它的名字，在tir'su——吉斯洋基語裡可以粗略地翻譯為「痛苦之僕」。、

@57668  = ~The look on your face reminds me of a cousin I had on the coast by the name of Milton Bottlesworth, who used to make a "Shining Sea Ale" that would set your riptide to undertow, if you know what I mean. I tell you, he got so involved in the tasting that he fell into the keg up to his ankles the wrong way around and had to breathe through the spigot for three hours lest he drown in a watery tomb of his own making. Helpful Aunt Tildeberry came in later for a late night snifter and tried to unclog the spout with a hairpin, and you can imagine the fuss that emerged from that mess. An inch or two off target and the mixture would have been the much less ominous "Poke in the Nose, '43," but that's neither here nor there.《你的長相讓我記起我一位名叫彌爾頓·巴托斯沃斯的表親，他曾經釀造過一種叫「閃亮海洋」的麥酒，那可以讓你有如置身洪濤巨浪之中，如果你知道我意思的話。有一晚，他釀造了一批特別烈的酒，原因你等一下就知道了，他注定要把它命名為「老獨眼43」。我跟你說，由於他如此地專注於品酒，一個不小心就頭上腳下地掉到酒桶裡面，他不得不借由水龍頭呼吸了三個小時，不然他就會淹死在自己製作的水墓之中。幸好泰德貝莉嬸嬸稍後也來到此處，在晚上睡前喝上一杯，並嘗試用髮夾清除水龍頭使其暢通，然後你就可以想像由那一團混亂所浮現的大驚小怪。只要差距目標一到兩英吋，這酒的名字就會變成比較不好聽的「戳到鼻子43」，但是那不在這邊，也不在那邊。》~
